dataNotes: v6.10 release-candidate scale scenario for the modern migration.
Expands Grey Tide to 120 hexes, 30 regions, and six operational sectors.
Uses existing terrain and region schema while adding modern key nodes for ISR, fires, air defense, logistics, and civilian buffers.
Modern victory is handled by VictoryRules for grey_tide_2030; JSON victoryConditions document the intended objective gates.

victoryConditions.description: Blue wins by controlling seven of ten main operational objectives before the end of turn 20.
Red wins at final turn if Blue controls fewer than six main operational objectives.
